clean_text: BACARDÍ Spiced Rum | Spice Rum | 35% Proof | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS COCKTAILS SPICED COLA SPICED BACARDÍ SPICED Made with aged rum and with a hint of smokiness from charred American oak barrels, BACARDÍ Spiced is a Gluten free rum blended with natural flavours and spices for a bold, yet smooth taste. The BACARDÍ Spiced liquid has both light and deep notes, making it perfect for mixing spiced rum drinks. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A SPICED & COLA A SPICED TREAT Tasting Notes BACARDÍ Spiced has upfront notes of creamy delicious vanilla, woody and subtle honey through the mid-palette, and a natural cinnamon and nutmeg spice finish. Nose Vanilla and cinnamon Palate Sweet and spiced Finish Black pepper and fudge BACARDÍ SPICED IS PERFECT TO ENJOY ICE COLD WITH COLA OR GINGER BEER BACARDÍ Cocktails SPICE IT UP Create a delicious twist and pleasant surprises in your next cocktail with BACARDÍ Spiced. We have something for everyone. TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW OUR RUMS BACARDÍ Carta Blanca BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO VIEW OUR RUMS MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT IS SPICED RUM? Spiced rum is often aged for as long as dark rum, but has added spices and caramel coloring. It usually carries a bold, yet smooth taste. IS SPICED RUM THE SAME AS GOLD RUM? No, spiced rum typically has added spices and flavourings to give it a bold, unique flavour, whereas gold rums tend to be more mellow. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.
